user.title: MiniMax credentials
user.description: Enter your MiniMax Personal Access Token. Create one at https://platform.minimax.io (Account → API Keys). The token and region must match.

voice.title: Default voice
voice.description: Choose the default voice and model used for speech synthesis. You can change these later in the integration options.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid token, or the token does not match the selected region.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach MiniMax. Check your internet connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: This MiniMax account is already configured.

data_description.language_boost: Leave as "auto" to let MiniMax detect the language, or set a language name to bias pronunciation.
